mapper.select:
SELECT a.id AS id, a.apply_content AS applyContent, a.apply_time AS applyTime, a.update_time AS updateTime, a.status AS status, c.name AS groupName, c.avatar_file_id AS avatarFileId, c.id AS groupId
FROM base_im_apply_group a
LEFT JOIN base_im_apply_group_extra b ON b.apply_group_id = a.id AND b.user_or_group_id = #{currentUserId} AND b.type = 101
LEFT JOIN base_im_group c ON c.id = a.target_group_id
WHERE (b.hidden_flag IS NULL OR b.hidden_flag = FALSE)
AND a.user_id = #{currentUserId}
AND a.status != #{dto.statusTemp}
AND c.id IS NOT NULL
AND (c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.searchKey}, '%') OR c.uuid LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.searchKey}, '%') OR a.apply_content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.searchKey}, '%'))
ORDER BY a.update_time DESC

SELECT a.id AS id, a.apply_content AS applyContent, a.apply_time AS applyTime, a.update_time AS updateTime, a.status AS status, b.nickname AS nickname, b.avatar_file_id AS avatarFileId, e.id AS groupId, b.id AS applyUserId, e.avatar_file_id AS groupAvatarFileId, e.name AS groupName, IF(f.user_id IS NULL, FALSE, TRUE) AS blockFlag, b.uuid AS uuid, e.uuid AS groupUuid
FROM base_im_apply_group a
LEFT JOIN base_user_info b ON b.id = a.user_id
LEFT JOIN base_im_apply_group_extra c ON c.apply_group_id = a.id AND c.user_or_group_id = a.target_group_id AND c.type = 201
LEFT JOIN base_im_group_ref_user d ON d.user_id = #{dto.currentUserId} AND d.group_id = a.target_group_id
LEFT JOIN base_im_group e ON e.id = a.target_group_id
LEFT JOIN base_im_block f ON f.source_id = a.target_group_id AND f.user_id = a.user_id AND f.source_type = #{dto.baseImTypeEnum}
WHERE (c.hidden_flag IS NULL OR c.hidden_flag = FALSE)
AND a.target_group_id = #{dto.groupId}
AND b.id IS NOT NULL
AND e.id IS NOT NULL
AND a.status != #{dto.statusTemp}
AND (b.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.searchKey}, '%') OR b.uuid LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.searchKey}, '%') OR a.apply_content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.searchKey}, '%'))
AND (e.belong_id = #{dto.currentUserId} OR d.manage_flag = TRUE)
ORDER BY a.update_time DESC
